name: current-2026-win-calibrated-championship-tail
description: Focused 2026 replay testing whether championship score-tail corrections should be separated from win-probability calibration through a parallel no-tail online EPA state.
modelNames: No-Future Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.25 L=30 C=40
No-Future Champs-PhaseResidualBoost Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.25 L=30 C=40 E=4 M=6 RB=0.15/0.25/0 N=8 W=18 POS
No-Future WinCal-NoTail Champs-PhaseResidualBoost Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.25 L=30 C=40 E=4 M=6 RB=0.15/0.25/0 N=8 W=18 POS
notes: WinCal-NoTail keeps the score estimate identical to the phase+residual championship tail candidate.
Only the red/blue win probability is recomputed from a parallel no-tail online EPA state, after the same component and residual correction layers.
